description: A shipment of a refrigerated product arrives at a pharmacy, and the temperature monitor shows it went above the required 8°C for 4 hours.

nodes.task_description: Log the temperature excursion event in the quality system, including the duration and peak temperature.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a new quality event record with all the details of the excursion.

nodes.task_description: Consult the product's stability data to determine if the excursion impacts product quality.

expected_outcome.value: Agent checks the stability profile and finds that the product is stable for up to 6 hours at the recorded temperature.

nodes.task_description: Make a disposition decision for the product.

expected_outcome.value: Based on the stability data, the agent makes the decision that the product is still usable and can be released.

nodes.task_description: Document the investigation and disposition decision, and close the quality event.

expected_outcome.value: Agent writes a summary report of the investigation and closes the event record.
